raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both lateral faces of box_2 are unobstructed, and there is sufficient clearance for the robot to align both arms on the left and right sides of the box without colliding with box_1 or the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is securely held by the robot’s two arms, lifted slightly above box_1, and no longer resting on box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (right of the box stack)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding box_2 and the region on the tabletop to the right of box_1 is clear of obstacles and large enough to accommodate a 30 cm box.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 rests stably on the cleared area of the table to the right of box_1 and is released by the robot."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1’s top is free (box_2 removed) and its left and right sides are fully accessible; the robot can position both arms around the box without interference from surrounding objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box (box_1) is firmly held by the robot’s two arms, lifted clear of the tabletop, ready for subsequent manipulation or transport as required."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Both lateral faces of box_2 are unobstructed, and there is sufficient clearance for the robot to align both arms on the left and right sides of the box without colliding with box_1 or the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is securely held by the robot’s two arms, lifted slightly above box_1, and no longer resting on box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding box_2 and the region on the tabletop to the right of box_1 is clear of obstacles and large enough to accommodate a 30 cm box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 rests stably on the cleared area of the table to the right of box_1 and is released by the robot.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1’s top is free (box_2 removed) and its left and right sides are fully accessible; the robot can position both arms around the box without interference from surrounding objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box (box_1) is firmly held by the robot’s two arms, lifted clear of the tabletop, ready for subsequent manipulation or transport as required.
